title: Polynomial, Rational, and Nonlinear Models
description: Compare alternative growth and geometry models for a production process. Learners cumulatively produce a nonlinear model comparison report through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Relate polynomial degree, roots, multiplicity, end behavior, and turning points.
Fit and critique polynomial models without extrapolating unsupported behavior.
Interpret zeros, holes, asymptotes, and domain restrictions in rational models.
